title: taraxacum latulum
intro: Taraxacum latulum, commonly known as the lesser dandelion or small dandelion, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion genus. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum latulum include improving digestion, reducing blood pressure, and supporting liver function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used as a natural remedy in folk medicine.
